ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt
Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: ROASTED HAZELNUTS (57%), ROASTED CASHEWS (30%), DATE POWDER CACAO POWDER (5%), SEA SALT CONTAINS: TREE NUTS (HAZELNUTS, CASHEWS) MAY BE PRESENT: PEANUTS, SESAME, OTHER TREE NUTS
